title: Adina's Kit's Cutie Flowers
description: ♡ A resource pack that turns armour into super cute flower accessories! ♡
body:
Not only is it cute & fashionable, but it barely interferes with your skin!

Coming in many different colors it's an amazing way to compliment your skin!

- # Credit! (please read)

Kit/Lilette
Poofyfish
glazebee

- # Kit/Lilette
for making "Kit's Cutie Flower Armor!" & for giving me permission to make this port!
> Planet Minecraft [Lil Cat Lilette].
>
> [Lil Cat Lilette]: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lilcatlilette/

- # Poofyfish/Fish
for making "Poofy's random wholesome pack" of which "Kit's Cutie Flower Armor!" is based on!
> Planet Minecraft [Poofyfish].
>
> [Poofyfish]: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/poofyfish/

- # glazebee
for  helping make the original port to bedrock & being inspiration for the logo!
> Planet Minecraft [glazebee].
>
> [glazebee]: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/glazebee/

- # Now for screenshots :3

- # Leather is brown.

![A screenshot of undyed leather armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/830f2e377d7d9e3caa287c1c3dbe497da5800fc9_0.webp)

- # Chainmail is pink

![A screenshot of chainmail armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0b2877b0c2f165bac91b38c4caa4578a74a13b2_0.webp)

- # Iron is white.

![A screenshot of iron armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/874fa95344da18b2a6a071c11ad2cb4029914816_0.webp)

- # Gold is pale yellow.

![a screenshot of gold armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae6f05a5a66cb7d1dae3ee3dfaf20236ffc9b88_0.webp)

- # Diamond is baby blue.

![A screenshot of diamond armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed5d3987d64299e81a5b9119aa5bfb5037c2e90_0.webp)

- # Netherite is black & dark purple.

![a screenshot of netherite armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7be5b75b8612038c2c6d48732e088fa1ab0bac15_0.webp)

This is a port of an old resource pack that will be updated with armor trims, copper, horse armor, wolf armor, llama cloaks and support for whatever is added!

As for others that Lilette made 

the elytra is a set of pink angel-wings & The turtle helmet is a seagrass turtle crown!

- # Elytra

![screenshot of elytra on a player model while crouching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91409f0fde9b557286bb9e45395eb1ebbac929dd_0.webp)
